key_needs: Chicken breast (2 lbs) or turkey if cheaper
Avoid shellfish, beef, pork, soy, tofu, and cow’s milk
summary: Weekly household order for the Williams household with a $180 total budget. Includes groceries (protein, produce, grains, dairy-free items), pantry staples, and household supplies. Preferences: eco-friendly packaging, avoid artificial fragrances; dietary restrictions include no shellfish, beef, pork, soy/tofu, or cow’s milk. For substitution approvals, contact kesha.williams@example.com.
